accounts.name: subscriber_wrapped_account
docs: Subscriber's Token-2022 wrapped USDC account (source of the transfer).

accounts.name: merchant_wrapped_account
docs: Merchant's Token-2022 wrapped USDC account (destination of the transfer).

accounts.name: wrapped_usdc_mint
docs: The Token-2022 wrapped USDC mint charged by the billing transfer.

accounts.name: mint_authority
docs: permanent delegate, and vault owner. Seeds: [b"mint-authority"]

accounts.name: wrapped_usdc_mint
docs: The Token-2022 wrapped USDC mint account to create.

accounts.name: spl_usdc_mint
docs: The SPL USDC mint (not Token-2022) used for the backing vault.

accounts.name: wrapping_vault
docs: The SPL USDC vault ATA for holding subscriber deposits.
Owned by mint_authority PDA, associated with spl_usdc_mint.

accounts.name: spl_usdc_mint
docs: The SPL USDC mint (Token program, not Token-2022).

accounts.name: wrapped_usdc_mint
docs: The Token-2022 wrapped USDC mint (must match config.wrapped_usdc_mint).

accounts.name: user_wrapped_account
docs: User's Token-2022 wrapped USDC account (source to burn from).

accounts.name: user_usdc_account
docs: User's SPL USDC account (destination for released USDC).

accounts.name: wrapping_vault
docs: Protocol's SPL USDC vault (releases USDC to user, must match config.wrapping_vault).

accounts.name: spl_usdc_mint
docs: The SPL USDC mint (Token program, not Token-2022).

accounts.name: wrapped_usdc_mint
docs: The Token-2022 wrapped USDC mint (must match config.wrapped_usdc_mint).

accounts.name: subscriber_usdc_account
docs: Subscriber's SPL USDC token account (source of SPL USDC deposit).

accounts.name: destination_wrapped_account
docs: Subscriber's Token-2022 wrapped USDC account (destination for minted wrapped USDC).

accounts.name: wrapping_vault
docs: Protocol's SPL USDC vault (receives subscriber deposit, must match config.wrapping_vault).

errors.name: PullTooEarly
errors.msg: Pull attempted before next_payment_due

errors.name: MandateNotActive
errors.msg: Mandate has expired or been cancelled

errors.name: MaxPullsExceeded
errors.msg: Maximum pulls exhausted for this mandate

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Subscriber has insufficient token balance

errors.name: UnauthorizedCancel
errors.msg: Only the subscriber can cancel their mandate

errors.name: FrequencyTooLow
errors.msg: Plan frequency below minimum (3600 seconds)

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: PlanNotActive
errors.msg: Plan is not active

errors.name: MandateExpired
errors.msg: Mandate has expired

errors.name: AmountExceedsPlanAmount
errors.msg: Pull amount exceeds plan amount

errors.name: MaxPullsTooLow
errors.msg: Plan max_pulls must be at least 1

errors.name: ApprovalNotGranted
errors.msg: No valid PullApproval PDA exists -- Arcium validation required

errors.name: ApprovalExpired
errors.msg: PullApproval has expired (past valid_until timestamp)

errors.name: AbortedComputation
errors.msg: Arcium computation was aborted or produced invalid output

errors.name: ClusterNotSet
errors.msg: Arcium cluster not configured in ProtocolConfig

errors.name: UnauthorizedAdmin
errors.msg: Only the protocol admin can perform this action

errors.name: ApprovalAlreadyExists
errors.msg: PullApproval already exists for this billing period

errors.name: ArciumUnavailable
errors.msg: Arcium is unavailable -- pull blocked (fail-closed per D-01)

errors.name: InvalidCiphertextInput
errors.msg: Encrypted input payload length does not match the circuit interface

errors.name: PendingBillingRecord
errors.msg: The previous pull is missing its billing record; finalize billing before executing again

errors.name: BillingEventAlreadyExists
errors.msg: BillingEvent already exists for this pull execution

errors.name: InvalidArciumAccount
errors.msg: Arcium account set does not match the configured canonical PDAs

errors.name: InvalidProtocolConfig
errors.msg: ProtocolConfig contains an invalid or inconsistent Arcium cluster configuration

errors.name: InvalidCallbackBinding
errors.msg: The supplied Arcium callback does not match the queued Vela request

errors.name: InvalidComputationOffset
errors.msg: Computation offset must match the protocol-derived request identity

errors.name: WrappedMintAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Wrapped USDC mint has already been initialized

errors.name: TransferNotAuthorized
errors.msg: Transfer not authorized -- no valid PullApproval and not a wrap/unwrap operation

errors.name: VaultMismatch
errors.msg: Wrapping vault mismatch -- vault address does not match ProtocolConfig

errors.name: UsdcMintMismatch
errors.msg: SPL USDC mint mismatch -- provided mint is not the expected USDC mint

errors.name: WrappedMintNotInitialized
errors.msg: Wrapped USDC mint not yet initialized in ProtocolConfig

errors.name: EndpointTooLong
errors.msg: Keeper endpoint exceeds maximum length (128 bytes)
